revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:R from adjective]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 3123 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from adjective |name=From an adjective |from=an [[adjective]], which is a word or phrase that describes a [[noun]], |to=a related word or topic |main category=Redirects from adjectives }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from adjective |name=From an adjective |from=an [[adjective]], which is a word or phrase that describes a [[noun]], |to=a related word or topic |main category=Redirects from adjectives }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from adjective |name=From an adjective |from=an [[:en:Adjective|Adjective]], which is a word or phrase that describes a [[:en:Noun|Noun]], |to=a related word or topic |main category=Redirects from adjectives }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from adjective |name=From an adjective |from=an [[:en:Adjective|Adjective]], which is a word or phrase that describes a [[:en:Noun|Noun]], |to=a related word or topic |main category=Redirects from adjectives }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from adjective |name=From an adjective |from=an [[:en:Adjective|Adjective]], which is a word or phrase that describes a [[:en:Noun|Noun]], |to=a related word or topic |main category=Redirects from adjectives }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from adjective |name=From an adjective |from=an [[:en:Adjective|Adjective]], which is a word or phrase that describes a [[:en:Noun|Noun]], |to=a related word or topic |main category=Redirects from adjectives }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from adjective |name=From an adjective |from=an [[:en:Adjective|Adjective]], which is a word or phrase that describes a [[:en:Noun|Noun]], |to=a related word or topic |main category=Redirects from adjectives }}<noinclude>
